evals.description: Triggers when user asks about help center category structure
evals.prompt: I need to design the category hierarchy for our SaaS help center. We have billing, team management, integrations, and reporting features. Where do I start?

evals.description: Triggers when user asks about writing a support article
evals.prompt: How should I write a knowledge base article that helps users reset their password?
Users can't find our help articles in search even though we have them. How do I improve our help center search?

evals.description: Agent designs a goal-based taxonomy, not feature-based
evals.prompt: Design a complete help center category structure for a project management tool. The product has tasks, projects, timelines, team management, and Slack integrations.

evals.description: Agent writes a how-to article with correct structure
evals.prompt: Write a help center article for 'How to export project data as a CSV file'

evals.description: Agent writes a troubleshooting article with causes and solutions
evals.prompt: Write a troubleshooting article for users who see 'Payment Failed' when upgrading their plan

evals.description: Agent recommends synonym dictionary for search mismatches
evals.prompt: Our articles use the word 'invoice' but users search for 'bill' and get zero results. What should we do?

evals.description: Agent explains deflection rate and how to measure it
evals.prompt: How do I measure whether our knowledge base is actually reducing support tickets?

evals.description: Agent provides a maintenance workflow with review cadence
evals.prompt: We have 200 help articles and no process for keeping them updated. How do we maintain this?

evals.description: Agent warns against answer-burying and enforces scan-first writing
evals.prompt: I wrote an article that starts with three paragraphs of background before the actual steps. Is that a good structure?

evals.description: Agent gives contextual help patterns for in-product implementation
evals.prompt: We want to add help tooltips and contextual guidance inside our app. What patterns should we use?

evals.description: Agent does not trigger for internal runbook or API docs requests
evals.prompt: Write a runbook for our on-call engineers to follow when the payment service goes down
